overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a lush tropical river environment. The character walks along a rocky riverbank and enters a shallow stream with crystal clear water, surrounded by dense vegetation and dramatic sunbeams filtering through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky tropical riverbank with large boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dry rocky riverbank wearing a skirt made of green foliage, surrounded by dense tropical forest

entered.detail: massive light-colored boulder sitting on the sandy shore
dense jungle vegetation lining the far bank of the river
calm turquoise river water visible between the trees
large green fern plants on the right side of the path
tall tropical trees with dense canopy creating shade
sandy and rocky ground surface of the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dry, sandy riverbank surrounded by dense tropical vegetation. Large boulders dot the landscape to the left while tall trees line the right side, with glimpses of turquoise river water visible through the forest canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach to river with sunbeams

events.description: sunbeams become more prominent through the trees as the character approaches the open river area

agents.ego_description: navigating through increasingly rocky terrain approaching the water's edge, with dramatic god rays filtering through the canopy

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with reddish-brown stone texture
hazy mist hanging over the distant river valley

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes rockier as the character approaches the river, with large stones replacing the sandy ground. A steep cliff rises on the left while mist gathers in the distant valley ahead, and sunbeams pierce through the tree canopy creating dramatic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river with rocky bed and aquatic plants

events.description: character steps from dry riverbank into the shallow river water
aquatic vegetation becomes denser as the character wades through deeper sections of the river

agents.ego_description: wading through the crystal clear shallow river, water splashing around legs, with the foliage skirt appearing wet and darker

notable_agents.action: bird flying across the sky above the river valley

entered.detail: crystal clear shallow water with visible rocky bottom
submerged rocks and pebbles visible beneath the water surface
tall green grass growing in the river shallows
mist rising from a distant waterfall at the end of the river canyon

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow river, wading through crystal clear water that reveals the rocky riverbed below. Tall aquatic grasses sway in the current as the character progresses toward a misty waterfall in the distance, with steep rock walls now flanking both sides of the narrow river canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dry tropical riverbank into the heart of a misty, water-filled canyon. It begins with the character walking along a sandy path flanked by dense vegetation and large boulders, with glimpses of turquoise water peeking through the forest canopy. As the terrain becomes rockier, the path leads toward a steep cliff and a distant valley where dramatic sunbeams pierce through the trees. The scene then shifts as the character enters the shallow river, wading through crystal clear water and swaying aquatic grasses. Finally, the environment narrows into a canyon with steep rock walls on both sides, guiding the movement toward a misty waterfall in the distance.
